AL PRINCIPLES 3
stars and a quarter. In other words each Sign contains nine
Padas or quarters of stars. Me/a has Asvini. Bharani and the
first Pada of Krttika, Vrfabha the remaining three quarters of
Krttika, Rohini and the first two Padas of Mrgasiras; Mirhuna,
the latter half of MrgaSiras, Ardra and the first three quarters of
Punarvasu; Karkafaka, the last Pada of Punarvasu, Pusya and
the whole of Aslesa, Simha, Magha, Purva Phalguni and the
first Pada of Uttara Phalguni; Kanya, the remaining three Padas of
U. Phalguni, Hasta and the first half of Citra; Tula, the latter
half of Citra, Svati and the first three Padas of Visakha; Vrscika,
the last quarter of Visakha. Anuradha and the whole of Jyestha:
Dhanus, Mula, Purvasadha and the first Pada of Uttarasadha;
Makara, the remaining three quarters of Uttarasadha,
Sravana and the first half of Dhanistha; Kumbha, the latter half of
Dhanistha, £atabhi$ak and the first three Padas of Purvabhadra;
